name: Telemetry & Artifact Linker
when_to_use: Связывает issue, workflow run, branch, PR, checks, deployment, dashboards, logs и agent session external URLs.
Seed rationale: Без сквозной связки человек теряет наблюдаемость над системой.
inputs: Должен уметь публиковать canonical URLs обратно в Linear comment/activity и собирать correlation ids.
steps: TBD: convert the seed build spec into a stable step-by-step skill contract.
stop_conditions: TBD: define success and stop boundaries before runtime consumption.
escalation_rules: Escalate when the required source-of-truth inputs are missing, contradictory, or blocked by a human-owned zone.
anti_patterns: Do not duplicate always-on repo guidance inside selective skills.
Do not silently widen role scope beyond the owning skill pack.
denied_actions: Do not treat this skeleton metadata as runtime-ready execution logic before the later runtime-consumption blocks.
description: Связывает issue, workflow run, branch, PR, checks, deployment, dashboards, logs и agent session external URLs.
why: Без сквозной связки человек теряет наблюдаемость над системой.
build_spec: Должен уметь публиковать canonical URLs обратно в Linear comment/activity и собирать correlation ids.
